name: Grilled Jumbo Shrimp with Citrus Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Fresh basil, minced OR 1/2 tablespoon Dried basil
1 teaspoon Fresh thyme, minced OR 1/2 teaspoon Dried thyme
1 pound Extra-large shrimp (about 18 shells removed and cleaned)
recipeInstructions:
1. For the marinade, combine vegetable oil, orange zest, lime zest, basil, thyme, shrimp, salt, and pepper in a mixing bowl.
2. Marinate at room temperature for about 3 hours or refrigerate if possible.
3. Preheat grill or broiler.
4. In a sauté pan over medium heat, warm vegetable oil. Add vegetables (artichokes, fennel, red bell pepper, and zucchini) and garlic; saute for 4 minutes, stirring constantly.
5. Season with salt and pepper. Add balsamic vinegar and continue cooking for 1 minute more.
6. Combine orange juice, grapefruit juice, lime juice, honey, and Dijon-style mustard in a mixing bowl. Whisk to dissolve honey.
7. Remove shrimp from marinade and grill or broil for 2 minutes on each side.
8. Divide sautéed vegetables among salad plates. Top with 3 shrimp and pour citrus vinaigrette.
